tasks.label: Build QSES Debug
tasks.command: for /f "usebackq tokens=*" %i in (`"%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -products * -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe`) do "%i" /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /p:GenerateFullPaths=true
